candidates.title: Daybreak: Tools for securing every organization in the world
candidates.summary: OpenAI introduces new Daybreak tools, including Codex Security and GPT-5.5-Cyber, to help organizations find, validate, and patch vulnerabilities at scale.

candidates.title: Samsung Electronics brings ChatGPT and Codex to employees
candidates.summary: Samsung Electronics deploys ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex to employees worldwide, marking one of OpenAI’s largest enterprise AI rollouts.

candidates.title: The founder conference built for growth: TechCrunch Founder Summit pass rates increase June 26
candidates.summary: Save up to $190 on your pass to TechCrunch Founder Summit 2026 by June 26, 11:59 p.m. PT. Designed for founders first on November 4 in Boston. Register today.
